questionHtml: Jennifer was absent for the first test but scored 29 marks on the second test. Use an appropriate regression equation to estimate Jennifer’s mark on the first test.
markschemeHtml:
substitution into their x on y equation        (M1)

x = 1.29082(29) − 10.3793

x = 27.1      A1

Note: Accept 27.

[2 marks]

meta.title: Jennifer was absent for the first test but scored 29 marks on the second test. Use an appropriate regression equation to estimate Jennifer’s mark on the first test.
